name_en: Fendi F8BS010AS Blue Mon Tresor Small Bucket Handbag, with drawstring and Fendi metal logo decoration. Includes one long and one short detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder or crossbody, Dimensions: 18cmX12cmX10cm
